manifest_must_contain: does not send raw observed text
without adding screenshots, OCR, clipboard capture, desktop control, cloud upload, or MCP write tools
skill_must_contain: winchronicle workday intent "开始工作" --execute
winchronicle workday intent "结束工作并总结" --execute --wait-seconds 60
winchronicle workday intent "查看工作记录状态" --execute
If the user only says a workday recording phrase, execute the matching command first.
Do not run preliminary repository discovery commands such as `git status`, `rg`, `Get-ChildItem`, `Get-Content`, or `ls`.
Do not read AGENTS.md only to start recording.
Do not use the repository task report format for recording-only turns
Do not inspect, scan, review, edit, test, commit, push, or release repository files.
This plugin is a thin wrapper around existing WinChronicle CLI behavior.
The workday flow is an explicit finite local monitor session.
Observed UI content remains `untrusted_observed_content`.
no screenshot fallback
no OCR fallback
no clipboard reading
no keylogging
no audio recording
no cloud upload
no desktop control
no MCP write tools
it does not add, remove, or rename MCP tools
skill_forbidden_substrings: paste the CLI text summary directly into chat
Do not compress it into a one-paragraph agent summary
